Notice Of Joinder And Joinder Of Defendant Joseph Long, M.D. In Petition And Motion Of Codefendants Kaiser Foundation Health Plan, Inc., The Permanente Medical Group, Inc., And Kaiser Foundation Hospitals To Compel Arbitration Of All Claims
Off Calendar Jan-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shawn Tillis of Winer & McKenna, LLP telephone number 510-433-1000 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff.
Sonja Dahl of Donnelly Nelson Depolo & Murray telephone number 925-287-8181 for Defendant Joseph Long, M.D.
Yvonne Pierrou of Marion's Inn LLP telephone number 510-451-6770 for Defendants Kaiser Foundation Health Plan, Kaiser Foundation Hopsitals and The Permanente Medical Group.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, Joinder Of Defendant Joseph Long, M.D. In Petition And Motion Of Co-Defendants Kaiser Foundation Health Plan, Inc., The Permanente Medical Group, Inc., And Kaiser Foundation Hospitals To Compel Arbitration Of All Claims was taken under submission.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
